productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Pink Tops
description: Composition Pink U-neck top made of 100% cotton, with cap sleeves with ribbed hems, pleated at the back and has a button embellishment with Big Ben logo above the left hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Don that feminine look in style with this pink top from united colors of benetton. The deep U-neck helps yoy flaunt that pretty neck of yours, while the caps sleeves add attitude to your rounded arms. The pleats on the back help it flare a little, allowing the top to drape well around your torso, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or knee-length denim skirts and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
